nasb.text: She will be led to the King in embroidered work; The virgins, her companions who follow her, Will be brought to You.

esv.text: In many-colored robes she is led to the king, with her virgin companions following behind her.

cnv.text: 她身穿刺繡的衣服，被引到王的面前； 她後面伴隨的童女， 也都被帶到你的面前。

ccb.text: 她身披锦绣， 由侍女伴随前来见王，

csbs.text: 她身穿绣花的彩衣，被领到王那里； 她后面陪伴着的童女们也被带到你那里。
